description:
Overview:
Deviation 5-20 ° intelligent reminder.
Bluetooth connection APP.
Professional posture correction course. Helps to correct the wrong body posture of back and shoulders.
Human-computer interactive games.
Soft food grade silicone.
Innovative design, light and thin wear.
USB Type-C charging.

Specifications:
Rated input: 5V 1A
Power supply: Internal power supply
Communication method: Bluetooth 4.1 or higher
Charging time: 1.5 hours
Temperature: -10-55℃
Relative humidity: ≤80%R.H
Software version: Support IOS6.5.8, Android 6.5.7, or above
Color: Adult: Red; Child: Pink,, Blue

Specification: English version ，Chinese Version（Only the black adult version can use the English version of the APP）

Package Content:
1 x Intelligent Posture Corrector
1 x USB Cable
